title: 72-month master plan + Russian-language 12-month CSV + SF-86 prep
public_claim: 72-month master plan + Russian-language 12-month CSV + SF-86 prep is a method packet for this is the session-continuity handoff from a long strategic-planning conversation between the user ("Nik") and a prior assistant acting as career strategist, intelligence-career planner, and meta-analyst.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
